titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 5966

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=764 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.648533+00 | translation moa=765 status=reviewed modified=2022-10-31 21:10:50.656884+00

p.cl:
. Vniuersis sancte Matris Ecclesie filiis ad quos presens scriptum peruenerit  laurencius filius Willelmi filii Gocelini
de Berewic salutem .

me pro salute anime mee . antecessorum . et successorum meorum
Dedisse . Concessisse . et hac carta mea Confirmasse deo et Ecclesie Sancte Ebbe de Coldingham . Ricardo Priori
et Monachis ibidem deo seruientibus et Inperpetuum seruituris vnuam Bouatam terre In territorio de Prendergest’
de terra defensibili . illam silicet Bouatam terre uersus orientem quam aldanus filius Waldeui tenuit . et
Quindecim accras terre que erant quondam de dominico Iohannis de Neuill’ . silicet ad thornedales 
sex accras terre . ad Backestanesrig  duas accras terre et dimidiam . Ad Crumbedales tres accras terre et dimidiam
ad Scortlandes  vnam accram terre et dimidiam . ad lillesaccre  vnam accram terre . et ad Crumbedales  vnam
dimidiam accram terre . Quas quidem terras habui de dono Roberti fratris mei qui eas libere adquisiuit
de Iohanne de neuill’ . Tenend’ et Habend’ dictis Priori et monachis de Coldingham et eorum successoribus cum
omnibus libertatibus et assiamentis . ad dictas terras pertinentibus in liberam . puram. et perpetuam elemosinam
adeo libere et quiete In omnibus  sicut aliqua elemosina infra Regnum Scocie liberius et quiecius tenetur
uel possidetur .

Testibus . Domino Willelmo de mordingtona . domino dauid de Haddingtona . Domino Radfulo nobili .
Domino Willelmo de scremerstona . Adam de Prendergest’ . Adam filio Iohannis de Superyoryeytona . Thoma de Nesbyt . Ber
tramo de Ristona . Patricio Scotto . Gilberto de Lumesden . Iohanne filio Ingerami . Gregorio de Betyoc . et ALIIS .
To all sons of holy Mother Church to whom the present writing shall have come, Laurence, son of William son of Gocelin of Berwick, sends greeting.

for the salvation of my soul, my ancestors' and successors', to have given, granted, and by this my charter to have made firm, to God and the Church of St Æbbe at Coldingham, to Richard the Prior, and to the monks serving God in that place now and for ever in the future, one oxgang of land in the territory of Prenderguest of fortified land, namely, that oxgang of land towards the east which Haldane son of Waldef held, and fifteen acres of land which once belonged to the demesne of John of Neville, that is, six acres of land at Thornedales, two and a half acres of land at Backestanesrig, three and a half acres of land at Crumbedales, one and a half acres of land at Scortlandes, one acre of land at Lilliesaccre, and a half acre of land at Crumbedales; and these lands I had from the gift of my brother, Robert, who freely acquired them from John of Neville; for the said prior and monks of Coldingham and their successors to hold and to have, with all liberties and easements pertaining to the said lands, in free, pure, and perpetual alms, as freely and quitely in all things as any alms within the kingdom of Scotland is freely and quitely held or possessed.

As witnesses, the lord William of Mordington, the lord David of Haddington, the lord Ralph Noble, the lord William of Scremerston, Adam of Prenderguest, Adam son of John of Over Ayton, Thomas of Nisbet, Bertram of Reston, Patrick Scott, Gilbert of Lumsdaine, John son of Ingram, Gregory of Beoch, and others.
